name: gurney-codex
description: Escalate hard tasks from the local Qwen models to OpenAI Codex over a ChatGPT subscription (OAuth). Codex acts as Gurney's deep-reasoning brain for coding, reasoning, writing, planning, and analysis the small models can't do at quality. Local-first.

telegram_commands.description: Send a task straight to Codex: /codex <task>
